sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-01 15:30:00'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-01 15:45:00');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = date_trunc('minute', event_time) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_trunc('hour', event_time) AS truncated_hour FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, date_trunc('day', event_time) AS truncated_day FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-01 15:00:00';
